Abstract: This paper develops new variance-reduction techniques for the forward-reflected-backward splitting (FRBS) method to solve a class of possibly nonmonotone stochastic composite inclusions. Unlike unbiased estimators such as mini-batching, developing stochastic biased variants faces a fundamental technical challenge and has not been utilized before for inclusions and fixed-point problems. We fill this gap by designing a new framework that can handle both unbiased and biased estimators. Our main idea is to construct stochastic variance-reduced estimators for the forward-reflected direction and use them to perform iterate updates. First, we propose a class of unbiased variance-reduced estimators and show that increasing mini-batch SGD, loopless-SVRG, and SAGA estimators fall within this class. For these unbiased estimators, we establish a $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$ best-iterate convergence rate for the expected squared residual norm, together with almost-sure convergence of the iterate sequence to a solution. Consequently, we prove that the best oracle complexities for the $n$-finite-sum and expectation settings are $\mathcal{O}(n^{2/3}ε^{-2})$ and $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-10/3})$, respectively, when employing loopless-SVRG or SAGA, where $ε$ is a desired accuracy. Second, we introduce a new class of biased variance-reduced estimators for the forward-reflected direction, which includes SARAH, Hybrid SGD, and Hybrid SVRG as special instances. While the convergence rates remain valid for these biased estimators, the resulting oracle complexities are $\mathcal{O}(n^{3/4}ε^{-2})$ and $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-5})$ for the $n$-finite-sum and expectation settings, respectively. Finally, we conduct two numerical experiments on AUC optimization for imbalanced classification and policy evaluation in reinforcement learning.

</details>


### [864] [Physics-Informed Neural Systems for the Simulation of EUV Electromagnetic Wave Diffraction from a Lithography Mask](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15584)
*Vasiliy A. Es'kin,Egor V. Ivanov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于物理信息神经网络(PINNs)和神经算子(NOs)的混合波导神经算子(WGNO)，用于加速极紫外光刻掩模衍射计算，在保持精度的同时显著减少预测时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数值求解器计算极紫外光刻掩模衍射问题耗时较长，影响掩模设计和优化效率。需要开发更高效的计算方法加速下一代光刻掩模设计流程。

Method: 提出混合波导神经算子(WGNO)，将波导方法中最计算密集的部分替换为神经网络。比较PINNs和神经算子与现代数值求解器的精度和推理时间，重点研究13.5nm和11.2nm波长下的解精度。

Result: 在2D和3D掩模上的数值实验表明，PINNs和神经算子达到竞争性精度且预测时间显著减少。WGNO架构达到最先进性能，对未见问题参数具有良好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 提出的神经算子方法为加速下一代光刻掩模设计和优化工作流程提供了高效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) and neural operators (NOs) for solving the problem of diffraction of Extreme Ultraviolet (EUV) electromagnetic waves from contemporary lithography masks are presented. A novel hybrid Waveguide Neural Operator (WGNO) is introduced, based on a waveguide method with its most computationally expensive components replaced by a neural network. To evaluate performance, the accuracy and inference time of PINNs and NOs are compared against modern numerical solvers for a series of problems with known exact solutions. The emphasis is placed on investigation of solution accuracy by considered artificial neural systems for 13.5 nm and 11.2 nm wavelengths. Numerical experiments on realistic 2D and 3D masks demonstrate that PINNs and neural operators achieve competitive accuracy and significantly reduced prediction times, with the proposed WGNO architecture reaching state-of-the-art performance. The presented neural operator has pronounced generalizing properties, meaning that for unseen problem parameters it delivers a solution accuracy close to that for parameters seen in the training dataset. These results provide a highly efficient solution for accelerating the design and optimization workflows of next-generation lithography masks.

</details>


### [865] [Effective Distillation to Hybrid xLSTM Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15590)
*Lukas Hauzenberger,Niklas Schmidinger,Thomas Schmied,Anamaria-Roberta Hartl,David Stap,Pieter-Jan Hoedt,Maximilian Beck,Sebastian Böck,Günter Klambauer,Sepp Hochreiter*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种无损蒸馏方法，将二次注意力机制的LLM蒸馏到亚二次线性化的xLSTM架构中，通过合并线性化专家实现性能恢复甚至超越教师模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有将二次注意力LLM蒸馏到亚二次线性化架构的方法，在下游任务上往往无法匹配教师模型的性能。研究旨在实现无损蒸馏，定义为学生与教师在任务集上的容差校正Win-and-Tie率，以开发更节能、成本效益更高的Transformer替代方案。

Method: 提出了针对xLSTM学生模型的有效蒸馏流程，包括额外的合并阶段，将单独线性化的专家组合成单一模型。从Llama、Qwen和Olmo系列中蒸馏基础模型和指令调优模型。

Result: 在多种设置下，基于xLSTM的学生模型恢复了教师模型的大部分性能，甚至在某些下游任务上超越了教师模型。

Conclusion: 该研究为实现更节能、成本效益更高的Transformer-based LLM替代方案迈出了重要一步，展示了xLSTM架构在无损蒸馏中的潜力。

Abstract: There have been numerous attempts to distill quadratic attention-based large language models (LLMs) into sub-quadratic linearized architectures. However, despite extensive research, such distilled models often fail to match the performance of their teacher LLMs on various downstream tasks. We set out the goal of lossless distillation, which we define in terms of tolerance-corrected Win-and-Tie rates between student and teacher on sets of tasks. To this end, we introduce an effective distillation pipeline for xLSTM-based students. We propose an additional merging stage, where individually linearized experts are combined into a single model. We show the effectiveness of this pipeline by distilling base and instruction-tuned models from the Llama, Qwen, and Olmo families. In many settings, our xLSTM-based students recover most of the teacher's performance, and even exceed it on some downstream tasks. Our contributions are an important step towards more energy-efficient and cost-effective replacements for transformer-based LLMs.

</details>


### [866] [Robust and Computationally Efficient Linear Contextual Bandits under Adversarial Corruption and Heavy-Tailed Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15596)
*Naoto Tani,Futoshi Futami*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于在线镜像下降的高效算法，解决对抗性污染和重尾噪声下的线性上下文赌博机问题，计算成本从O(t log T)降至O(1)每轮，无需先验知识仍保证次线性遗憾。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法同时处理对抗性污染和重尾噪声时，需要有限方差假设且计算效率低下。本文旨在设计一个计算高效、无需先验知识、能同时应对这两种挑战的算法。

Method: 基于在线镜像下降（OMD）的算法，适用于噪声具有有限(1+ε)阶矩的情况。算法无需预先知道噪声矩界或污染总量，计算复杂度为O(1)每轮。

Result: 算法达到加性遗憾界，包含依赖于噪声(1+ε)阶矩的项和依赖于污染总量的项。当ε=1时恢复有限方差假设下的现有保证；无污染时匹配重尾噪声下的最佳已知速率。

Conclusion: 提出的OMD算法在对抗性污染和重尾噪声下实现了计算效率和鲁棒性的平衡，无需先验知识仍能保证次线性遗憾，显著改进了现有方法的计算复杂度。

Abstract: We study linear contextual bandits under adversarial corruption and heavy-tailed noise with finite $(1+ε)$-th moments for some $ε\in (0,1]$. Existing work that addresses both adversarial corruption and heavy-tailed noise relies on a finite variance (i.e., finite second-moment) assumption and suffers from computational inefficiency. We propose a computationally efficient algorithm based on online mirror descent that achieves robustness to both adversarial corruption and heavy-tailed noise. While the existing algorithm incurs $\mathcal{O}(t\log T)$ computational cost, our algorithm reduces this to $\mathcal{O}(1)$ per round. We establish an additive regret bound consisting of a term depending on the $(1+ε)$-moment bound of the noise and a term depending on the total amount of corruption. In particular, when $ε= 1$, our result recovers existing guarantees under finite-variance assumptions. When no corruption is present, it matches the best-known rates for linear contextual bandits with heavy-tailed noise. Moreover, the algorithm requires no prior knowledge of the noise moment bound or the total amount of corruption and still guarantees sublinear regret.

</details>


### [867] [SmartSearch: How Ranking Beats Structure for Conversational Memory Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15599)
*Jesper Derehag,Carlos Calva,Timmy Ghiurau*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SmartSearch提出了一种完全确定性的对话记忆检索系统，无需LLM结构化或学习式检索策略，通过NER加权子串匹配、规则实体发现和混合排序实现高效检索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对话记忆系统过度依赖LLM在摄入时的结构化处理和学习式检索策略，这些方法计算成本高且复杂。作者希望证明这些都不是必要的，可以设计更简单高效的确定性检索系统。

Method: 采用完全确定性的检索管道：1) NER加权子串匹配实现召回；2) 基于规则的实体发现进行多跳扩展；3) CrossEncoder+ColBERT排序融合阶段（唯一的学习组件），在CPU上运行约650ms。

Result: 在两个基准测试上表现优异：LoCoMo达到93.5%，LongMemEval-S达到88.4%，超过所有已知记忆系统，同时比全上下文基线少用8.5倍token。检索召回率达到98.6%。

Conclusion: 无需LLM结构化或学习式检索策略即可实现高效的对话记忆检索。确定性方法结合智能排序和分数自适应截断能够显著提升性能，同时大幅减少计算资源消耗。

Abstract: Recent conversational memory systems invest heavily in LLM-based structuring at ingestion time and learned retrieval policies at query time. We show that neither is necessary. SmartSearch retrieves from raw, unstructured conversation history using a fully deterministic pipeline: NER-weighted substring matching for recall, rule-based entity discovery for multi-hop expansion, and a CrossEncoder+ColBERT rank fusion stage -- the only learned component -- running on CPU in ~650ms. Oracle analysis on two benchmarks identifies a compilation bottleneck: retrieval recall reaches 98.6%, but without intelligent ranking only 22.5% of gold evidence survives truncation to the token budget. With score-adaptive truncation and no per-dataset tuning, SmartSearch achieves 93.5% on LoCoMo and 88.4% on LongMemEval-S, exceeding all known memory systems under the same evaluation protocol on both benchmarks while using 8.5x fewer tokens than full-context baselines.

</details>


### [868] [HorizonMath: Measuring AI Progress Toward Mathematical Discovery with Automatic Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15617)
*Erik Y. Wang,Sumeet Motwani,James V. Roggeveen,Eliot Hodges,Dulhan Jayalath,Charles London,Kalyan Ramakrishnan,Flaviu Cipcigan,Philip Torr,Alessandro Abate*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HorizonMath是一个包含100多个未解决数学问题的基准测试，专注于验证简单但需要深刻数学洞察的问题，GPT 5.4 Pro在其中两个问题上提出了优于已知最佳结果的解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估AI是否能在未解决的数学问题上做出新颖研究，现有基准测试依赖形式化证明验证或人工评审，难以规模化，且容易受到数据污染影响。

Method: 创建HorizonMath基准测试，包含8个计算和应用数学领域的100多个未解决问题，这些问题验证简单但需要数学洞察力，并开发开源评估框架进行自动验证。

Result: 大多数最先进模型在基准测试上得分接近0%，但GPT 5.4 Pro在两个问题上提出了优于已发表最佳结果的解决方案，可能代表新颖贡献（待专家评审）。

Conclusion: HorizonMath作为开放挑战和社区资源发布，其中未解决问题的正确解决方案可能构成数学文献中的新颖结果，为AI数学研究评估提供了新平台。

Abstract: Can AI make progress on important, unsolved mathematical problems? Large language models are now capable of sophisticated mathematical and scientific reasoning, but whether they can perform novel research is still widely debated and underexplored. We introduce HorizonMath, a benchmark of over 100 predominantly unsolved problems spanning 8 domains in computational and applied mathematics, paired with an open-source evaluation framework for automated verification. Our benchmark targets a class of problems where discovery is hard, requiring meaningful mathematical insight, but verification is computationally efficient and simple. Because these solutions are unknown, HorizonMath is immune to data contamination, and most state-of-the-art models score near 0%. Existing research-level benchmarks instead rely on formal proof verification or manual review, both of which are expensive to scale. Using this platform, we find two problems for which GPT 5.4 Pro proposes solutions that improve on the best-known published results, representing potential novel contributions (pending expert review). We release HorizonMath as an open challenge and a growing community resource, where correct solutions to problems in the unsolved problem classes could constitute novel results in the mathematical literature.

</details>


### [869] [Learning Enhanced Structural Representations with Block-Based Uncertainties for Ocean Floor Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.14372)
*Jose Marie Antonio Minoza*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于空间块和VQ-VAE的不确定性感知机制，用于高分辨率海底地形重建，通过块状保形预测捕捉局部复杂性，提供空间自适应置信度估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前全球海底地形数据分辨率不足，无法支持精确数值模拟；现有深度学习方法在保持物理结构一致性和量化不确定性方面存在困难，限制了海洋建模和海岸灾害预测的可靠性。

Method: 采用基于块状保形预测的不确定性感知机制，结合VQ-VAE架构，通过空间块设计高效捕捉局部海底地形复杂性，利用离散潜在表示保持地形特征，提供空间自适应置信度估计。

Result: 在多个海洋区域的实验结果表明，相比传统技术，该方法在重建质量和不确定性估计可靠性方面均有显著提升，在特征良好区域提供较小不确定性宽度，在复杂海底结构区域提供适当较大的边界。

Conclusion: 该框架通过保持结构完整性并提供空间自适应不确定性估计，提高了海底地形重建的可靠性，为更稳健的气候建模和海岸灾害评估开辟了新途径。

Abstract: Accurate ocean modeling and coastal hazard prediction depend on high-resolution bathymetric data; yet, current worldwide datasets are too coarse for exact numerical simulations. While recent deep learning advances have improved earth observation data resolution, existing methods struggle with the unique challenges of producing detailed ocean floor maps, especially in maintaining physical structure consistency and quantifying uncertainties. This work presents a novel uncertainty-aware mechanism using spatial blocks to efficiently capture local bathymetric complexity based on block-based conformal prediction. Using the Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) architecture, the integration of this uncertainty quantification framework yields spatially adaptive confidence estimates while preserving topographical features via discrete latent representations. With smaller uncertainty widths in well-characterized areas and appropriately larger bounds in areas of complex seafloor structures, the block-based design adapts uncertainty estimates to local bathymetric complexity. Compared to conventional techniques, experimental results over several ocean regions show notable increases in both reconstruction quality and uncertainty estimation reliability. This framework increases the reliability of bathymetric reconstructions by preserving structural integrity while offering spatially adaptive uncertainty estimates, so opening the path for more solid climate modeling and coastal hazard assessment.

</details>


### [870] [ML-EcoLyzer: Quantifying the Environmental Cost of Machine Learning Inference Across Frameworks and Hardware](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.06694)
*Jose Marie Antonio Minoza,Rex Gregor Laylo,Christian F Villarin,Sebastian C. Ibanez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ML-EcoLyzer是一个跨框架工具，用于测量机器学习推理在CPU、消费级GPU和数据中心加速器上的碳排放、能耗、热耗和水耗成本，并引入环境可持续性评分(ESS)来量化每克CO₂排放所能服务的有效参数数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习推理规模巨大，但其环境影响（特别是在低资源硬件上）尚未得到充分量化。需要工具来测量推理过程中的碳、能源、热和水成本，以促进可持续的模型选择。

Method: 开发ML-EcoLyzer跨框架工具，支持经典和现代模型，采用自适应监测和硬件感知评估。引入环境可持续性评分(ESS)作为量化指标，评估超过1,900种推理配置，涵盖不同模型架构、任务模态、硬件类型和精度级别。

Result: 量化可以提升ESS；大型加速器在轻量级应用中可能效率低下；即使是小型模型，如果实现不当也可能产生显著成本。工具提供了推理过程中环境成本的广泛实证评估。

Conclusion: ML-EcoLyzer为可持续性意识模型选择设定了标准，提供了推理环境成本的全面评估框架，有助于优化机器学习系统的环境影响。

Abstract: Machine learning inference occurs at a massive scale, yet its environmental impact remains poorly quantified, especially on low-resource hardware. We present ML-EcoLyzer, a cross-framework tool for measuring the carbon, energy, thermal, and water costs of inference across CPUs, consumer GPUs, and datacenter accelerators. The tool supports both classical and modern models, applying adaptive monitoring and hardware-aware evaluation.
  We introduce the Environmental Sustainability Score (ESS), which quantifies the number of effective parameters served per gram of CO$_2$ emitted. Our evaluation covers over 1,900 inference configurations, spanning diverse model architectures, task modalities (text, vision, audio, tabular), hardware types, and precision levels. These rigorous and reliable measurements demonstrate that quantization enhances ESS, huge accelerators can be inefficient for lightweight applications, and even small models may incur significant costs when implemented suboptimally. ML-EcoLyzer sets a standard for sustainability-conscious model selection and offers an extensive empirical evaluation of environmental costs during inference.

</details>


<div id='math.NA'></div>

# math.NA [[Back]](#toc)

### [871] [A Discrete Radon Transform Based on the Area of Cube-Plane Intersection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13503)
*Robert Beinert,Jonas Bresch,Michael Quellmalz*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对体素化数据的精确离散Radon变换方法，通过推导立方体的闭式Radon变换公式，实现了在任意维度下的高效计算，并引入正则化变体提升数值稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Radon变换是断层成像、最优传输、晶体学和几何分析中的基本工具，但数值计算需要精确的离散化。现有方法在处理体素化图像和对象时存在精度和效率问题，特别是在高维情况下。

Method: 推导了任意维度d中轴对齐立方体的闭式分段多项式Radon变换表达式。基于此公式，提出了在ℝ^d中的离散Radon变换，该变换对体素化数据在解析上是精确的且计算高效。为了改进数值稳定性，引入了正则化变体，将立方体的Radon变换（即立方体与超平面的(d-1)维交集面积）替换为立方体与超平面周围薄板区域的d维交集体积。

Result: 数值实验证明了该方法在3D形状匹配、分类和切片Wasserstein重心等多个应用中的有效性。通过与蒙特卡洛积分的比较，验证了在高维情况下的计算效率。

Conclusion: 该方法为体素化数据提供了一种解析精确且计算高效的离散Radon变换，通过正则化变体提升了数值稳定性，在高维应用中表现出色，为断层成像、最优传输等领域提供了实用的数值工具。

Abstract: The Radon transform is a fundamental tool for analyzing data in tomographic imaging, optimal transport, crystallography, and geometric analysis. Numerical computations require an accurate discretization. To deal with voxelized images and objects, we derive a closed-form, piecewise polynomial expression for the Radon transform of an axis-aligned cube in arbitrary dimension $d$. Building on this formula, we propose a discrete Radon transform in $\mathbb{R}^d$ that is both analytically exact for voxelized data and computationally efficient. For improved numerical stability, we introduce a regularized variant replacing the Radon transform of a cube, i.e.\ the $(d-1)$-dimensional area of the intersection between that cube and a hyperplane, by the $d$-dimensional volume of the intersection between the cube and a thin slab around the hyperplane. Numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach in several applications including 3D shape matching, classification, and sliced Wasserstein barycenters. The computational efficiency in higher dimensions is verified by a comparison with Monte Carlo integration.

</details>


### [872] [Efficient Sketching-Based Summation of Tucker Tensors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13532)
*Rudi Smith,Mirjeta Pasha,Andrés Galindo-Olarte,Hussam Al Daas,Grey Ballard,Joseph Nakao,Jing-Mei Qiu,William Taitano*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出基于素描（sketching）的张量Tucker格式高效求和方法，通过Khatri-Rao和Kronecker乘积的代数结构实现压缩运算，避免大型中间张量显式形成，在控制秩增长和计算成本的同时保持高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 张量求和是许多科学计算问题的核心计算瓶颈，传统方法需要显式形成大型中间张量，计算成本高。需要开发高效方法在保持精度的同时降低计算复杂度。

Method: 提出基于素描的张量Tucker格式求和方法，利用Khatri-Rao和Kronecker乘积的代数结构，直接在因子矩阵和核心张量上操作，避免大型中间张量的显式形成，产生精确的低秩近似。

Result: 数值实验在四个问题上验证了方法的有效性：两个合成测试案例、参数依赖椭圆方程（cookie问题）和一维线性输运问题。素描方法相比直接求和和重新压缩实现了显著的计算节省，同时保持了高精度。

Conclusion: 提出的素描框架为Tucker格式张量求和提供了高效解决方案，在控制秩增长和计算成本的同时保持高精度，适用于需要重复张量求和作为计算瓶颈的各种科学计算问题。

Abstract: We present efficient, sketching-based methods for the summation of tensors in Tucker format. Leveraging the algebraic structure of Khatri-Rao and Kronecker products, our approach enables compressed arithmetic on Tucker tensors while controlling rank growth and computational cost. The proposed sketching framework avoids the explicit formation of large intermediate tensors, instead operating directly on the factor matrices and core tensors to produce accurate low-rank approximations of tensor sums. Furthermore, we analyze the computational complexity and the theoretical approximation properties of the proposed methodology. Numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on four problems: two synthetic test cases, a parameter-dependent elliptic equation (commonly referred to as the cookie problem) solved via GMRES, and a one-dimensional linear transport problem discretized via high-order discontinuous Galerkin methods, where repeated tensor summation arises as a core computational bottleneck. Across these examples, the sketching-based summation achieves substantial computational savings while preserving high accuracy relative to direct summation and re-compression.

</details>


### [873] [Computing the Gross-Pitaevskii Ground State via Wasserstein Gradient Flow in Diffeomorphism Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13579)
*Xiangxiong Zhang,Haomin Zhou*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 使用Wasserstein梯度下降在微分同胚空间中计算Gross-Pitaevskii方程的基态，通过参数化传输映射表示密度，实现无网格、保持单位质量约束的数值方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法计算Gross-Pitaevskii方程基态时存在网格依赖和质量约束保持问题，需要一种无网格且能自然保持单位质量约束的数值方法。

Method: 将密度表示为固定参考测度通过参数化传输映射的推前映射，使用边界保持的神经ODE实现传输映射，在有限维参数空间中通过Wasserstein度量的拉回进行自然梯度下降。

Result: 在1D、2D、3D维度上进行了数值实验，参数化Wasserstein梯度流输出可用于初始化H^1 Sobolev梯度流，与平凡初始条件相比，在2D中初始能量间隙减少7倍，在3D中减少4.5倍。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种无网格、保持质量约束的Gross-Pitaevskii方程基态计算方法，参数化Wasserstein梯度流可作为有效的预处理器，显著改善传统梯度流方法的收敛性。

Abstract: We compute the ground state $u$ of the Gross--Pitaevskii equation (GPE) via Wasserstein gradient descent in diffeomorphism space. We represent the density $ρ=u^2$ as the push-forward of a fixed reference measure through a parameterized transport map $T_θ$, realized by a boundary-preserving Neural ODE. The Wasserstein gradient flow on probability densities then lifts to natural gradient descent in the finite-dimensional parameter space, with metric tensor given by the pullback of the Wasserstein metric. The method is entirely mesh-free and preserves the unit-mass constraint without normalization. We present numerical experiments in dimensions $d=1,2,3$ and demonstrate that the parameterized Wasserstein gradient flow (PWGF) output can be used to initialize the $H^1$ Sobolev gradient flow, reducing the initial energy gap by a factor of $7$ in 2D and $4.5$ in 3D compared to trivial initial conditions.

</details>


### [874] [NEP_MiniMax: An Approach for NEPs Based on Matrix-valued Minimax Approximations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13794)
*Chenkun Zhang,Jiawei Gu,Lei-Hong Zhang*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: NEP_MiniMax：一种求解非线性特征值问题的新方法，结合有理极小极大逼近和结构利用线性化技术，在紧致连续集上高效计算特征对。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非线性特征值问题求解方法在处理紧致连续集上的问题时，需要在精度、效率和数值稳定性之间进行权衡。本文旨在开发一种既能保证均匀精度，又能保持数值稳定性的新方法。

Method: 方法包含两个核心组件：1）有理极小极大逼近方案，使用m-d-Lawson算法从T(x)的分裂形式构造向量值函数的极小极大有理逼近，得到矩阵值有理逼近R*(x)=P*(x)/q*(x)≈T(x)；2）结构利用线性化技术，将多项式特征值问题P*(λ)u=0通过强线性化求解，精确保持特征值重数。

Result: 在NLEVP基准测试集上的数值实验表明，NEP_MiniMax在效率和精度方面与最先进方法（如Beyn、NLEIGS、SV-AAA）具有竞争力，理论误差界直接将特征对逼近质量与有理逼近质量联系起来。

Conclusion: NEP_MiniMax为求解紧致连续集上的非线性特征值问题提供了一种有效的新方法，结合了极小极大逼近的精度优势和结构保持线性化的数值稳定性，具有理论保证和实际竞争力。

Abstract: We propose NEP_MiniMax, a novel computational method for solving nonlinear eigenvalue problems (NEPs) $T(λ)\mathbf{u}= 0$ on compact continua $Ω\subset \mathbb{C}$. The method combines two key components: (1) a rational minimax approximation scheme where the {m-d-Lawson} algorithm constructs a minimax rational approximation for the vector-valued function from $T(x)$'s split form, yielding a matrix-valued rational approximation $R^*(x) = P^*(x)/q^*(x) \approx T(x)$, and (2) a structure-exploiting linearization technique. The minimax approximation guarantees uniform accuracy while generally keeping $R^*(x)$ pole-free in $Ω$. Eigenpairs are then computed by solving a polynomial eigenvalue problem $P^*(λ) \mathbf{u}= 0$ via a strong linearization that exactly preserves eigenvalue multiplicities. Numerical experiments on benchmarks from the NLEVP collection demonstrate competitiveness with state-of-the-art methods (e.g., Beyn, NLEIGS, SV-AAA) in efficiency and accuracy, with theoretical error bounds directly relating eigenpair approximations to the rational approximation quality.

</details>


### [875] [$N$-Dimensional curve following for solving numerically systems of nonlinear equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13809)
*Katerina G. Hadjifotinou*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出一种通过曲线追踪在n维盒子内寻找n个非线性方程所有实数解的数值方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要一种可靠的方法来寻找非线性方程组在给定区域内的所有实数解，现有方法在效率和可靠性方面存在不足

Method: 采用曲线追踪方法：1) 定位n-1个方程形成的曲线部分；2) 在n维盒子内数值追踪这些曲线；3) 找到这些曲线与剩余方程超曲面的交点。使用牛顿法等局部收敛方法，配合符号变化和二分法

Result: 在约130个经典测试问题（维度高达n=10）中成功找到所有已知实数解，在二维问题上比Kuiken方法快10倍以上

Conclusion: 该方法能可靠地找到非线性方程组在给定区域内的所有实数解，性能优于现有方法，并包含问题优化程序以提高算法性能

Abstract: This paper presents a methodology for finding numerically, by means of curve-following, all real solutions of a general system of $n$ nonlinear equations in $n$ unknowns, within a given $n$-dimensional box. The main idea behind our method is a) to locate all parts of the curves formed by a selected subset of $n-1$ equations of the initial system, b) follow these parts numerically within the given $n$-box and c) during this process, find all their intersection points with the hypersurface that represents the left-out equation of the initial system. With proper handling techniques, both stages (a) and (b) can be done with safety even when using a rapidly - but locally - convergent method such as Newton's method. Stage (c) on the other hand is theoretically straightforward and can be implemented by examining sign change and using bisection. However, improvement of performance with automatic step-size adaptation is also feasible.
  Since the choice of the left-out equation as well as the order of the unknowns, in some problems may affect the algorithm's performance, a secondary procedure for problem optimization has also been developed. This integrated algorithm has been successfully tested in all classical test-problems that are used in the literature (in total about 130 problems with dimension up to $n=10$) and achieved to locate approximations to all the known real solutions of each test-problem, with a user-provided accuracy. It has also proved to be more than 10 times quicker than Kuiken's 2D curve-following method, when compared in two-dimensional problems.

</details>


### [876] [Regge metrics with enhanced trace](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13977)
*Snorre H. Christiansen,Ting Lin*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出具有增强迹性质的Regge有限元度量变体，迹算子在连续函数有限元空间上是满射，可用于高阶多项式构造，在广义相对论、不可压缩弹性和共形几何中有应用潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 改进Regge有限元度量的迹性质，使其迹算子在连续函数有限元空间上具有满射性，从而为相关物理和几何问题提供更好的数值离散工具。

Method: 引入Regge有限元度量的变体，通过将标量函数乘以单位张量构造度量空间，支持高阶多项式基函数，可在Clough-Tocher或Worsey-Farin细分网格上构建。

Result: 获得了具有增强迹性质的Regge度量变体，迹算子到连续函数有限元空间是满射的，为相关应用提供了更优的数学框架。

Conclusion: 提出的Regge度量变体具有改进的迹性质，为广义相对论、不可压缩弹性和共形几何等领域的数值模拟提供了有前景的离散化方法。

Abstract: We introduce variants of Regge finite element metrics with enhanced properties of the trace. In particular the trace operator is surjective to a finite element space of continuous functions. Multiplying these scalar functions by the identity tensor brings one back to the finite element space of metrics. The metrics can be based on high order polynomials and be constructed on refinements, such as the Clough-Tocher or Worsey-Farin splits. Potential applications to general relativity, incompressible elasticity and conformal geometry are sketched.

</details>


### [877] [A Mixed Finite Element Method for the Dirichlet Vector Laplacian in Three Dimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14026)
*Ralf Hiptmair,Peiyang Yu,Tianwei Yu*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文建立了三维向量拉普拉斯Dirichlet边值问题的混合FEEC型有限元逼近的适定性和先验误差分析，证明了次优收敛率，并将二维结果扩展到三维一般拓扑域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Dirichlet边界条件破坏了标准de Rham复形的结构，需要将涡度寻求在非标准函数空间中以保证适定性。需要将之前二维分析扩展到三维一般拓扑域。

Method: 采用混合FEEC型有限元方法，为离散旋度调和函数建立离散Caccioppoli型不等式，推导能量范数和L^2范数下的误差估计。

Result: 证明了在一般域上能量范数中(k-1/2)阶收敛，在凸域上L^2范数中k阶收敛，其中k≥1是有限元空间的多项式次数。这些结果确认了数值观察到的次优收敛率。

Conclusion: 成功将二维向量拉普拉斯Dirichlet边值问题的混合有限元分析扩展到三维一般拓扑域，并作为直接应用研究了斯托克斯问题的涡度-速度-压力形式离散化。

Abstract: This work establishes the well-posedness and a priori error analysis for the mixed FEEC-type finite element approximation of the three-dimensional vector Laplace boundary value problem subject to the Dirichlet boundary condition. The Dirichlet condition disrupts the structure of the standard de Rham complex, requiring the vorticity to be sought in a non-standard function space to achieve well-posedness. We derive error estimates that confirm the numerically observed suboptimal convergence rates. In particular, by developing a discrete Caccioppoli-type inequality for discrete curl-harmonic functions, we prove $(k-1/2)$-th order convergence in the energy norm on general domains and $k$-th order convergence in $L^2$ on convex domains, where $k \ge 1$ denotes polynomial degrees of the finite element spaces. These results extend the previous two-dimensional analysis developed in [Arnold, D.N., Falk, R.S. and Gopalakrishnan, J., 2012. Mixed finite element approximation of the vector Laplacian with Dirichlet boundary conditions. Mathematical Models and Methods in Applied Sciences, 22(9), p.1250024.]~to three-dimensional domains with general topology. As a direct application, a discretization of the Stokes problem in vorticity-velocity-pressure form is studied.

</details>


### [878] [Energy Dissipation Preserving Feature-based DNN Galerkin Methods for Gradient Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14029)
*Tao Tang,Jiang Yang,Yuxiang Zhao,Quanhui Zhu*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出基于特征的深度神经网络Galerkin框架，用于梯度流的结构保持模拟，通过将神经网络作为自适应特征生成器而非优化求解器，保证半离散能量耗散，在高维设置中保持鲁棒性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法如PINNs在求解微分方程时存在精度有限、训练成本高、鲁棒性不足等问题，特别是无法保持连续PDE模型的固有物理结构（如梯度流系统中的能量耗散特性）

Method: 提出特征基础的深度神经网络Galerkin框架，将神经网络作为自适应特征生成器，在Galerkin投影公式中定义非线性试验空间，该公式保证半离散能量耗散，可与能量稳定时间积分方案自然结合，研究了随机特征、结构化初始化和问题感知预训练等神经基函数构建策略

Result: 数值实验表明，该方法在高维设置中保持鲁棒的能量稳定性，准确捕捉复杂拓扑转变，在等效自由度下比经典谱方法获得更高精度

Conclusion: 提出的DNN-G框架通过将神经网络作为特征生成器而非优化求解器，有效解决了传统深度学习方法在结构保持方面的不足，展示了神经特征表示在偏微分方程数值求解中的有效性

Abstract: In recent years, deep learning methods, exemplified by Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), have been widely applied to the numerical solution of differential equations. However, these methods may suffer from limited accuracy, high training costs, and lack of robustness, particularly their inability to preserve the intrinsic physical structures of continuous PDE models, such as the energy dissipation property in gradient flow systems. To address these challenges, we propose a feature-based Deep Neural Network Galerkin (DNN-G) framework designed for structure-preserving simulations of gradient flows. Instead of treating neural networks merely as optimization-driven solvers, we employ them as adaptive feature generators that define nonlinear trial spaces within a Galerkin projection formulation.This formulation guarantees semi-discrete energy dissipation and can be naturally combined with energy stable time integration schemes. Several strategies for constructing neural basis functions are investigated, including random features, structured initialization, and problem-informed pre-training. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed method preserves robust energy stability in high-dimensional settings and accurately captures complex topological transitions. With equivalent degrees of freedom, the DNN-G framework achieves higher accuracy than classical spectral methods, highlighting the effectiveness of neural feature representations for the numerical solution of partial differential equations.

</details>


### [879] [A layer stripping method for numerical solution of the GPR problem in a layered medium](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14089)
*Ruben Airapetyan*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出一种结合层剥离技术和复频率域数据延拓的GPR数据处理方法，用于分段连续层状介质


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要一种有效的数值方法来处理地面穿透雷达在分段连续层状介质中的数据，提高探测精度和效率

Method: 结合层剥离技术和复频率域数据延拓的数值方法，通过将数据延拓到复频率域来改善处理效果

Result: 获得了误差估计并进行了数值测试，在特定假设下（层内电特性变化缓慢、层厚度至少为波长量级、介质电导率不高）方法具有数值效率

Conclusion: 该方法在特定条件下能够有效处理GPR数据，为分段连续层状介质的探测提供了一种可行的数值解决方案

Abstract: A numerical method for processing the data of ground penetrating radars for a piece-wise continuous layered medium is proposed. The method combines the layer stripping technique with numerical continuation of data into the complex frequency's domain. The accuracy of the method is analyzed. Error estimates are obtained and numerical testing is performed. They demonstrate numerical efficiency of the method under certain assumptions such as: electrical characteristics inside each layer change slowly, the thicknesses of the layers are at least of the order of the wavelength, conductivity of the medium is not high.

</details>


### [880] [Tensorial Reduced-Order Models for Parametric Coupled Reaction-Diffusion Systems: Application to Brain Tumor Growth Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14101)
*Asikul Islam,Md Rezwan Bin Mizan,Maxim Olshanskii,Andreas Mang*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文构建了脑肿瘤生长模拟中参数化前向算子的高效代理模型，基于张量降阶方法在复杂反应-扩散系统上实现了85-120倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑肿瘤生长模拟涉及复杂的耦合半线性抛物型反应-扩散系统，计算成本高昂。需要开发高效的代理模型来支持多查询工作流程，如参数估计、不确定性量化和优化。

Method: 采用有限体积法离散控制方程，算子分裂策略时间积分。开发了基于Tucker格式高阶奇异值分解和张量列车分解的张量降阶模型，包含侵入式和非侵入式变体，并与经典POD降阶模型进行对比。

Result: 在最多9个模型参数的数值实验中，张量代理模型相对于全阶求解器实现了85-120倍的加速，同时保持了优异的精度。

Conclusion: 张量代理模型为多查询工作流程提供了严谨高效的计算基础，特别适用于脑肿瘤生长模拟等复杂参数化系统的快速求解。

Abstract: We construct efficient surrogate models for parametric forward operators arising in brain tumor growth simulations, governed by coupled semilinear parabolic reaction-diffusion systems on heterogeneous two- and three-dimensional domains. We consider two models of increasing complexity: a scalar single-species formulation and a six-state, nine-parameter multi-species go-or-grow model. The governing equations are discretized using a finite volume method and integrated in time via an operator-splitting strategy. We develop tensorial reduced-order model (TROM) surrogates based on the Higher-Order Singular Value Decomposition in Tucker format and the Tensor Train decomposition, each in intrusive and non-intrusive variants. The models are compared against a classical proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) ROM baseline. Numerical experiments with up to $m=9$ model parameters demonstrate speedups of $85\times$-$120\times$ relative to the full-order solver while maintaining excellent accuracy, establishing tensorial surrogates as a rigorous and efficient computational foundation for many-query workflows.

</details>


### [881] [Semi-explicit time discretization for linear thermo-poroelasticity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14149)
*R. Altmann,R. Maier,J. Schmeck*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了线性热-孔隙弹性问题的部分和完全解耦时间步进方案，允许力学、热和流动方程顺序求解，保持一阶收敛性但计算更高效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决热-孔隙弹性耦合系统计算复杂的问题，通过解耦方案提高计算效率，同时保持收敛精度。

Method: 引入部分和完全解耦的时间步进方案，将力学、热和流动方程顺序求解而非同时求解，提供可先验检查的材料参数充分条件。

Result: 证明了所提方案具有一阶收敛性（与隐式欧拉格式相同），但计算更高效；数值实验验证了收敛结果并分析了参数条件的尖锐性。

Conclusion: 提出的解耦方案在保持收敛精度的同时显著提高了计算效率，为线性热-孔隙弹性问题提供了实用的数值求解方法。

Abstract: Within this paper, we introduce partially and fully decoupled time stepping schemes for linear thermo-poroelasticity. This means that the mechanics, heat, and flow equations can be solved sequentially. We provide sufficient conditions on the material parameters, which can be checked a priori, guaranteeing first-order convergence of the introduced schemes. Hence, the proposed methods have the same order as the implicit Euler scheme but are computationally more efficient due to the decoupling of the system equations. Numerical examples validate the proven convergence results and analyze the sharpness of the mentioned parameter condition. Further, we compare the schemes with other decoupling schemes from the literature.

</details>


### [882] [A Robust Learning-Based Method for the Helmholtz Equation in Dissipative Media and Complex Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14193)
*Lifu Song,Tingyue Li,Jin Cheng*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出使用贝塞尔基（BB）替代传统基本解基（FS），解决高频亥姆霍兹问题中耗散介质下的数值不稳定问题，实现机器精度精度并显著超越有限元法效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于学习数值方法（LbNM）使用基本解基（FS）重构解算子，但在耗散介质中不稳定且需要敏感的几何调参。需要更稳健的替代方案来处理高频亥姆霍兹问题中的污染效应。

Method: 提出使用贝塞尔基（BB）作为替代基础。从学习理论角度看，BB构成驻波的完整假设空间，确保对耗散引起的信号损失具有免疫力。建立了依赖于内在正则性的收敛结果，并通过多中心策略展示了框架的几何可扩展性。

Result: 数值实验表明：1）在FS失败的耗散区域中，该方法达到机器精度精度；2）在效率上显著优于有限元法（FEM）；3）通过多中心策略展示了框架的几何可扩展性。

Conclusion: 贝塞尔基为高频亥姆霍兹问题提供了稳健的数值方法，解决了传统基本解基在耗散介质中的不稳定性问题，实现了高精度和高效率，并具有几何可扩展性。

Abstract: To mitigate pollution effects in high-frequency Helmholtz problems, Learning-based Numerical Methods (LbNM) reconstruct solution operators using complete systems of exact solutions. However, the previously used fundamental-solution (FS) basis suffers from instability in dissipative media and requires sensitive geometric tuning. In this paper, we propose a robust alternative using a Bessel basis (BB). From a learning theory perspective, the BB forms a complete hypothesis space of standing waves, ensuring immunity to dissipation-induced signal loss. We establish a convergence result that depends on intrinsic regularity. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves machine-precision accuracy in dissipative regimes where FS fails, significantly outperforms the Finite Element Method (FEM) in efficiency, and demonstrates the framework's geometric extensibility via a multi-center strategy.

</details>


### [883] [Inference of interacting kernel in the mean-field regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14211)
*Peiyi Chen,Qin Li,Li Wang,Yunan Yang*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 研究从宏观测量中重建相互作用核的问题，比较基于粒子ODE系统和平均场PDE两种前向模型公式的差异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究从宏观测量中重建相互作用核的问题，探讨基于粒子系统的ODE模型和基于平均场的PDE模型这两种不同前向模型公式的相似性和差异

Method: 将相互作用核重建问题表述为优化问题，分析粒子系统（有限维耦合ODE）和平均场PDE两种前向模型公式，在平均场极限下研究两者的一阶变分关系

Result: 证明粒子系统的一阶变分不是平均场PDE一阶变分的无偏估计，但在温和假设下两者在弱意义下接近，收敛速度为$\mathcal{O}(N^{-1/2})$，数值实验进一步验证了该收敛率

Conclusion: 虽然粒子系统和平均场PDE两种前向模型公式在相互作用核重建问题中存在差异，但它们在弱意义下以$\mathcal{O}(N^{-1/2})$的速率收敛，为基于宏观测量的相互作用核重建提供了理论保证

Abstract: We study the problem of reconstructing interaction kernels in systems of interacting agents from macroscopic measurements when posed as an optimization problem. The reconstruction procedure depends on the formulation of the forward model, which may be given either by a finite-dimensional coupled ODE system tracking individual agent trajectories or by a mean-field PDE describing the evolution of the agent density. We investigate the similarities and differences between these two formulations in the mean-field regime. While the first variation derived from the particle system does not provide an unbiased estimator of the first variation associated with the limiting PDE, we prove that, under mild assumptions, the two are close in a weak sense with a convergence rate $\mathcal{O}(N^{-1/2})$. This rate is further confirmed by numerical evidences.

</details>


### [884] [A backward problem for the time-fractional pseudo-parabolic equation with a variable coefficient](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14223)
*Arshyn Altybay*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究时间分数阶伪抛物模型的反问题，通过终端时刻观测数据重建未知初始状态，结合理论分析和数值方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间分数阶伪抛物模型在物理和工程中有广泛应用，但初始状态通常难以直接测量。本文旨在解决从终端时刻观测数据反演初始状态这一逆问题，具有重要的理论和应用价值

Method: 理论方面：在适当假设下证明问题解的存在唯一性。计算方面：采用时间步进策略的有限差分离散化，进行稳定性与收敛性分析。基于前向求解器，使用Tikhonov正则化构建初始数据识别算法

Result: 理论证明了问题解的存在唯一性；数值方法具有稳定性和收敛性；Tikhonov正则化方法能有效重建初始状态；数值实验验证了方法的有效性，并对测量扰动具有鲁棒性

Conclusion: 本文成功解决了时间分数阶伪抛物模型的初始状态反演问题，建立了完整的理论框架和有效的数值算法，为相关逆问题的研究提供了系统解决方案

Abstract: This work addresses an inverse reconstruction task for a time-fractional pseudo-parabolic model with a temporally varying coefficient. By imposing Dirichlet boundary conditions, we aim to recover the unknown initial state from observations collected at the final time.
  From a theoretical perspective, we derive existence and uniqueness results by proving that, under suitable hypotheses, the problem admits a unique solution. Computationally, we introduce a finite-difference discretisation based on a time-stepping strategy and provide a detailed stability and convergence analysis. Leveraging the resulting forward solver, we then formulate an initial-data identification procedure using Tikhonov regularisation. The proposed approach is validated with numerical simulations, and its resilience is assessed via experiments that incorporate perturbations in the final-time measurements.

</details>


### [885] [High-precision quadrature via local Fourier extension: analytic integration, uniform sampling, and correction for piecewise smooth integrands](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14421)
*Xinran Liu,Zhenyu Zhao,Benxue Gong*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出基于局部傅里叶延拓(LFE)的高精度数值积分框架，通过TSVD稳定化处理，对光滑函数达到近机器精度，对分段光滑函数开发了基于系数能量异常的校正策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种高精度数值积分方法，能够有效处理光滑、振荡以及分段光滑函数，特别是当奇异点不在窗口端点时仍能保持高精度。

Method: 基于局部傅里叶延拓(LFE)近似，在每个子区间上构造TSVD稳定化的局部傅里叶延拓，在扩展周期域上解析计算积分。对分段光滑函数，通过系数能量异常识别含奇异点的窗口，并开发局部校正策略。

Result: 对光滑函数，该方法比复合辛普森规则使用更少的节点达到近机器精度；对振荡和变频率被积函数优势更明显；对分段光滑函数，校正后恢复近谱精度，即使奇异点不在窗口端点。

Conclusion: 提出的LFE积分框架在光滑和分段光滑函数上都能实现高精度数值积分，通过离线/在线实现保持高效性，且与经典复合规则兼容。

Abstract: We propose a high-precision numerical quadrature framework based on local Fourier extension (LFE) approximations. The method constructs, on each subinterval, a truncated-SVD stabilized local Fourier continuation of the integrand on an extended periodic domain, and then evaluates the integral \emph{analytically} from the resulting Fourier coefficients. Under uniform sampling, the discrete LFE matrix and its TSVD factors are precomputed once and reused across all windows, yielding an efficient offline/online implementation that remains compatible with classical composite rules.
  We provide an error bound that reduces the quadrature error to the LFE approximation error and derive algebraic convergence rates for Sobolev-regular integrands. Numerical experiments demonstrate that, on smooth functions, the proposed quadrature reaches near machine precision with substantially fewer nodes than the composite Simpson rule. The advantage persists for oscillatory and variable-frequency integrands and becomes more pronounced for nonuniform phase structures.
  For continuous piecewise smooth integrands, we develop a correction strategy driven by coefficient-energy outliers to identify singularity-containing windows, followed by a localized procedure that brackets the singular point within one grid cell and corrects only the affected window contribution. The corrected quadrature restores near-spectral accuracy in the reported tests, including cases where the singularity is not aligned with the window endpoints.

</details>


### [886] [Maximum Entropy Least Squares Solutions of Overdetermined Linear Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14547)
*Felice Iavernaro,Monica Lazzo,Lorenzo Pisani*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于熵的加权最小二乘法，通过最大化香农熵在给定均方误差约束下确定权重分布，用于处理含有稀疏粗大误差的鲁棒数据拟合问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统最小二乘法在处理含有稀疏粗大误差（异常值）的数据时不够鲁棒。本文旨在开发一种基于信息论原理的鲁棒拟合方法，通过熵最大化自动识别并抑制异常值的影响。

Method: 将权重向量解释为离散概率分布，在归一化和给定均方误差约束下最大化香农熵。与经典最小二乘法不同，均方误差作为控制参数，熵选择达到规定精度的最无偏权重分布。分析最优性系统，通过一阶和二阶条件刻画驻点。

Result: 证明了从普通最小二乘解出发存在光滑的熵最大化配置分支，并在适当非退化条件下建立了其全局延拓。当规定均方误差趋于零时，极限配置集中在与线性模型一致的最大数据子集上，从而抑制异常值影响。

Conclusion: 该方法为处理含有稀疏粗大误差的数据拟合问题提供了理论框架，通过熵最大化自动实现异常值抑制，数值实验验证了该方法的鲁棒性。

Abstract: We investigate the theoretical foundations of a recently introduced entropy-based formulation of weighted least squares for the approximation of overdetermined linear systems, motivated by robust data fitting in the presence of sparse gross errors. The weight vector is interpreted as a discrete probability distribution and is determined by maximizing Shannon entropy under normalization and a prescribed mean squared error (MSE) constraint. Unlike classical ordinary least squares, where the error level is an output of the minimization process, here the MSE value plays the role of a control parameter, and entropy selects the least biased weight distribution achieving the prescribed accuracy. The resulting optimization problem is nonconvex due to the nonlinear coupling between the weights and the solution induced by the residual constraint. We analyze the associated optimality system and characterize stationary points through first- and second-order conditions. We prove the existence and local uniqueness of a smooth branch of entropy-maximizing configurations emanating from the ordinary least squares solution and establish its global continuation under suitable nondegeneracy conditions. Furthermore, we investigate the asymptotic regime as the prescribed MSE tends to zero and show that, under appropriate assumptions, the limiting configuration concentrates on a largest subset of data consistent with the linear model, thus suppressing the influence of outliers. Two numerical experiments illustrate the theoretical findings and confirm the robustness properties of the method.

</details>


### [887] [A Numerical Solution to KPD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14612)
*Daizhan Cheng*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出一种基于平稳值的算法(SVA)来解决向量形式超矩阵的最近Kronecker积分解问题，通过迭代应用可解决有限和KPD，并利用置换矩阵将矩阵形式超矩阵的KPD转换为向量形式，使SVA同样适用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在解决超矩阵的最近Kronecker积分解问题时可能存在效率或精度不足的问题，需要开发更有效的算法来处理向量形式和矩阵形式超矩阵的KPD问题。

Method: 提出基于平稳值的算法(SVA)来求解向量形式超矩阵的最近Kronecker积分解；通过迭代应用SVA解决有限和KPD；引入置换矩阵将矩阵形式超矩阵的KPD问题转换为等价的向量形式问题，从而扩展SVA的适用范围。

Result: SVA算法能够有效解决向量形式和矩阵形式超矩阵的KPD问题；通过数值实验展示了新算法的性能，并与现有方法进行了比较验证。

Conclusion: 提出的SVA算法为求解超矩阵的最近Kronecker积分解问题提供了一种有效的解决方案，通过置换矩阵技术将矩阵形式问题转换为向量形式，扩展了算法的适用范围，数值实验验证了其有效性。

Abstract: A stationary value based algorithm (SVA) is provided to solve the nearest Kronecker product decomposition (KPD) problem of vector form hypermatrices. Using the algorithm successively, the finite sum KPD is also solved. Then the permutation matrix is introduced. Using it, the KPD of matrix form hypermatrices is converted to its equivalent KPD of vector forms, and then the SVA is also applicable to solve the same problems for vector form hypermatrix. Some numerical examples are presented to demonstrate the new algorithm and to compare it with existing methods.

</details>


### [888] [Model Order Reduction for Parametric Hermitian Eigenvalue Problems: Local Acceleration with Taylor-Reduced Basis Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14620)
*Benjamin Stamm,Zhuoyao Zeng*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 该论文提出泰勒-降基方法(Taylor-RBM)用于高效近似大规模参数化厄米矩阵的特征空间，通过捕捉谱投影算子在参考点处的导数信息构建近似空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对大规模参数化厄米矩阵的特征值问题，传统方法计算成本高，需要开发高效的模型降阶方法来近似特征空间，特别是在参数变化时。

Method: 提出泰勒-降基方法(Taylor-RBM)，这是一种局部模型降阶方法，通过在参数域参考点处捕捉谱投影算子的导数信息来构建近似空间，并与经典多元解析扰动理论中的截断幂级数方法进行比较分析。

Result: 进行了简洁的误差分析来验证Taylor-RBM对特征值问题的有效性，提出了计算高效的泰勒-降基空间组装程序，并详细分析了谱近似在两种方法中的表现。

Conclusion: 泰勒-降基方法为大规模参数化厄米矩阵的特征空间近似提供了有效的局部模型降阶技术，与经典扰动理论有紧密联系，在计算效率和精度之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: This paper is concerned with the Taylor-reduced basis method (Taylor-RBM) for the efficient approximation of eigenspaces of large scale parametric Hermitian matrices. The Taylor-RBM is a local model order reduction method, which constructs an approximation space by capturing derivatives information of the spectral projector at a reference point in the parameter domain. We perform a concise error analysis to justify the Taylor-RBM for eigenvalue problems, and we present a computationally efficient procedure to assemble the Taylor-reduced basis space. Since this method is tightly connected to the classical multivariate analytic perturbation theory, we also provide a detailed analysis of the spectral approximation using the truncated power series of the eigenprojector, and compare this with the approximation obtained from the Taylor-RBM.

</details>


### [889] [Edge element DtN method for electromagnetic scattering poles of perfectly conducting obstacles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14708)
*Bo Gong,Takumi Sato,Jiguang Sun,Xinming Wu*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出一种计算完美导体障碍物电磁散射极点的有限元DtN方法，避免了非物理极点，并通过谱指示器方法求解非线性矩阵特征值问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 散射算子的亚纯延拓导致复平面上的散射极点（共振），尽管其重要性，但散射极点的数值研究仍然有限

Method: 使用DtN映射截断散射问题的无界域，将极点表示为与麦克斯韦方程相关的全纯Fredholm算子函数的特征值，采用边缘元进行离散化

Result: 证明了基于全纯Fredholm算子函数特征值问题的抽象逼近理论的收敛性，提出的有限元DtN方法避免了非物理极点，数值算例验证了方法的有效性

Conclusion: 成功开发了一种计算电磁散射极点的数值方法，该方法理论严谨、计算有效，为散射极点的数值研究提供了可靠工具

Abstract: Meromorphic continuation of the scattering operator leads to scattering poles (resonances) in the complex plane. Despite their significance, numerical investigation of scattering poles remains limited. In this paper, we propose and analyze a numerical method to compute electromagnetic poles of perfectly conducting obstacles. The unbounded domain for the scattering problem is truncated using the DtN mapping and the poles are shown to be the eigenvalues of a holomorphic Fredholm operator function related to Maxwell's equations. Edge elements are used for discretization. The convergence is proved using the abstract approximation theory for eigenvalue problems of holomorphic Fredholm operator functions. The proposed finite element DtN approach is free of non-physical poles. A spectral indicator method is then employed to compute the resulting nonlinear matrix eigenvalue problem. Numerical examples are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method.

</details>


### [890] [A deep backward regression-based scheme for high-dimensional nonlinear partial differential equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14721)
*Qiang Han,Shaolin Ji,Yunzhang Li*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出基于深度后向回归的DBR方案，用于求解高维非线性抛物型偏微分方程，通过条件期望表示和去噪机制显著降低数值方差，在高达200维的有界解和20维的无界解问题上优于DBDP方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DBDP方法在处理高维非线性抛物型PDE时存在数值方差大、训练不稳定等问题，特别是在复杂无界PDE中性能受限。需要开发更稳定、泛化能力更强的深度学习方法来解决高维PDE问题。

Method: 基于DBDP方法，提出DBR方案：1) 将模拟后向随机差分方程重新表述为条件期望表示；2) 将基于投影的随机优化问题转化为确定性函数逼近任务；3) 在损失评估前引入条件期望的去噪机制；4) 通过后向归纳法顺序优化局部损失函数。

Result: 1) 有界解：在d=200维时保持准确性，优于DBDP1方法；2) 无界解：在d=20维时相对误差低于9.7%，而DBDP1在d>10时失效；3) 显著降低数值方差，提高训练稳定性和泛化性能；4) 理论上推导了误差上界并建立了半阶收敛性。

Conclusion: DBR方案通过条件期望表示和去噪机制有效解决了高维非线性抛物型PDE的计算挑战，在维度和复杂性方面显著优于现有方法，并具有理论保证。该方法还可扩展到变分不等式问题。

Abstract: A deep backward regression-based (DBR) scheme for solving high-dimensional nonlinear parabolic partial differential equations is proposed. Building upon the established DBDP method (Huré et al., 2020), our algorithm introduces a reformulation of the local loss functions that are sequentially optimized via backward induction at each time step. The core of this approach involves reformulating simulated backward stochastic difference equations into their conditional expectation representations, thereby recasting a projection-based stochastic optimization problem as a deterministic function-approximation task. By explicitly incorporating conditional expectations, the DBR scheme facilitates a denoising mechanism prior to loss evaluation. This architecture substantially mitigates numerical variance, resulting in enhanced training stability and superior generalization performance. Numerical results demonstrate that the DBR scheme consistently outperforms the DBDP1 method, maintaining accuracy up to d=200 for bounded solutions (see Table 1). Notably, for complex unbounded PDEs where the DBDP1 method fails beyond d=10, the DBR scheme remains robust up to $d=20$ with relative errors under 9.7% (see Table 6}). Theoretically, we derive rigorous upper error bounds and establish half-order convergence for the proposed scheme. Extensions to variational inequalities are also provided.

</details>


### [891] [Sparsity for parametric PDEs with log-gamma random inputs and applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14813)
*Dinh Dũng,Van Kien Nguyen,Viet Ha Hoang*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种新方法，用于建立参数椭圆PDE解在log-gamma输入下的Laguerre广义多项式混沌展开系数的稀疏性，并推导了参数变量半离散近似的收敛率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究参数椭圆PDE在log-gamma输入下解的稀疏表示，为高效数值方法提供理论基础，同时改进log-normal输入情况下的现有结果。

Method: 建立Laguerre广义多项式混沌展开系数的ℓp可和性与加权ℓ2可和性，基于稀疏性结果推导半离散近似的收敛率，包括稀疏网格多项式插值、扩展最小二乘近似及相关半离散求积规则。

Result: 证明了log-gamma输入下系数的稀疏性，获得了半离散近似的收敛率，并对log-normal输入情况改进了ℓp可和性的充分条件，特别是当分量函数具有全局支撑时。

Conclusion: 该方法成功建立了参数椭圆PDE在log-gamma输入下解的稀疏性，为高效数值逼近提供了理论保证，同时显著改进了log-normal输入情况下的现有理论结果。

Abstract: We propose a novel method for establishing the sparsity of the coefficients of the Laguerre generalized polynomial chaos expansion of solutions to parametric elliptic PDEs with log-gamma inputs on $\mathbb{R}_+^\infty$. The established sparsity is quantified by $\ell_p$-summability and weighted $\ell_2$-summability of the coefficients. Building on these sparsity results, we derive convergence rates for semi-discrete approximations in the parametric variables. These rates apply to sparse-grid polynomial interpolations, extended least-squares approximations and the associated semi-discrete quadrature rules. Moreover, a counterpart of our method for parametric elliptic PDEs with log-normal inputs yields a significant improvement in the sufficient condition for $\ell_p$-summability when the component functions in the log-normal representation of the parametric diffusion coefficients have global support, compared with results obtained in prior works.

</details>


### [892] [A well-balanced positivity-preserving discontinuous Galerkin method for shallow water models with variable density](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14954)
*Jun She,Haiyun Dong,Maojun Li,Jianjun Ma*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于变地形浅水流动与溶质输运耦合系统的数值格式，通过引入辅助变量和DG方法实现了良好平衡性和正性保持特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发能够准确模拟变地形条件下浅水流动与溶质输运耦合系统的数值方法，需要解决系统在静水条件下的稳态保持问题以及水深和浓度的正性保持问题。

Method: 通过引入辅助变量将变密度浅水方程重新表述为新形式，采用间断伽辽金方法配合Lax-Friedrichs数值通量进行离散化，并提出正性保持限制器。

Result: 提出的方法能够准确保持静水条件下的稳态解，验证了其良好平衡性；提出了保持水深和浓度正性的充分条件并严格证明；通过数值算例验证了计算精度和有效性。

Conclusion: 该数值格式成功解决了变地形浅水流动与溶质输运耦合系统的数值模拟问题，具有良好的平衡性、正性保持特性和计算精度。

Abstract: In this paper, we present a numerical scheme designed for coupled systems of variable-topography shallow water flow and solute transport. By integrating a variable-density system with an expression for relative density of mixtures, a novel formulation of the coupled system is derived. To ensure the well-balanced property, auxiliary variables are introduced to reformulate the variable-density shallow water equations into a new form, which is then discretized using the discontinuous Galerkin (DG) method with the Lax-Friedrichs (LF) flux as the numerical flux. By selecting appropriate values for the auxiliary variables, we demonstrate that the proposed method accurately preserves steady-state solutions under still water conditions, thereby verifying its well-balanced nature. Furthermore, sufficient conditions for preserving the positivity of both water depth and concentration are proposed and rigorously proven. A positivity-preserving limiter is introduced to enforce these conditions. Finally, a series of numerical examples are conducted to validate the computational accuracy and effectiveness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [893] [Well-posedness and instability of free electron quantum tomography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15058)
*Florian Oberender*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: PINEM量子态重建问题：利用正半定约束的正则化效应证明问题适定性，但不存在全局稳定性估计，任何估计器收敛速度任意慢


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光子诱导近场电子显微镜(PINEM)能够制备、相干操纵和表征自由电子量子态，但测量数据仅为电子能量谱图，需要重建表示量子态的密度矩阵，这是一个约束线性逆问题

Method: 利用正半定约束的正则化效应证明问题适定性；分析不存在全局稳定性估计的原因；推导离散化算子的分解以研究其单射性和稳定性；开发更快的数值实现方法

Result: 证明问题具有适定性但不具备稳定性估计；任何估计器收敛速度任意慢；通过数值实验验证不稳定性估计和约束问题的稳定性

Conclusion: PINEM量子态重建问题虽然适定但极不稳定，需要谨慎处理；正半定约束具有正则化效应；该分析为量子态层析成像提供了理论指导

Abstract: Recent advancements in photon induced near-field electron microscopy (PINEM) enable the preparation, coherent manipulation and characterization of free-electron quantum states. The available measurement consists of electron energy spectrograms and the goal is the reconstruction of a density matrix representing the quantum state. This requires the solution of a constrained linear inverse problem, where a positive semi-definite trace-class operator is reconstructed given its diagonal in different bases. We show the well-posedness of this problem by exploiting the regularizing effect of the positive semi-definiteness constraint. Unusually, well-posedness in this case does not imply any stability estimates. We show that no global stability estimates exist and any estimator converges arbitrarily slowly. We also provide further bounds on the instability generally complementing the analysis done in [arXiv:1907.03438]. Furthermore, we derive a decomposition of the discretized operator which allows us to study its injectivity and stability properties. It also leads to a faster implementation which we exploit in numerical experiments validating the instability estimates and the stability of the constrained problem.

</details>


### [894] [Trustworthy Koopman Operator Learning: Invariance Diagnostics and Error Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15091)
*Gustav Conradie,Nicolas Boullé,Jean-Christophe Loiseau,Steven L. Brunton,Matthew J. Colbrook*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种后验验证方法，用于量化数据驱动Koopman方法中的不变性和投影误差，通过主角度分解提供可验证的谱分析、认证预测和字典优化工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Koopman算子理论为非线性动力学提供全局线性表示，但实践中用户选择的字典诱导的有限维特征空间很少具有不变性，导致闭包失败和投影误差，产生虚假特征值、误导性Koopman模态和过度自信的预测。需要解决如何仅使用快照数据量化任意特征空间的不变性和投影误差，并利用这些诊断提供可操作的保证和指导字典优化。

Method: 开发统一的后验验证方法：1) 使用子空间与其Koopman像之间的主角度量化Koopman不变性，产生主可观测量和主角度分解(PAD)；2) 推导Koopman和Perron-Frobenius模态分解的多步误差界，包括基于RKHS的点式保证；3) 补充高斯过程期望误差代理；4) 形成验证工具箱。

Result: 该方法在混沌和高维基准测试以及真实世界数据集（包括腔流和冥王星-卡戎系统）上得到验证，能够进行可验证的谱分析、认证预测和原则性的字典与核学习，相比SVD截断有显著改进性能。

Conclusion: 该研究为数据驱动Koopman方法提供了一个统一的验证框架，能够量化不变性和投影误差，提供可操作的误差保证，并指导字典优化，解决了Koopman近似何时可信以及如何改进的核心验证问题。

Abstract: Koopman operator theory provides a global linear representation of nonlinear dynamics and underpins many data-driven methods. In practice, however, finite-dimensional feature spaces induced by a user-chosen dictionary are rarely invariant, so closure failures and projection errors lead to spurious eigenvalues, misleading Koopman modes, and overconfident forecasts. This paper addresses a central validation problem in data-driven Koopman methods: how to quantify invariance and projection errors for an arbitrary feature space using only snapshot data, and how to use these diagnostics to produce actionable guarantees and guide dictionary refinement? A unified a posteriori methodology is developed for certifying when a Koopman approximation is trustworthy and improving it when it is not. Koopman invariance is quantified using principal angles between a subspace and its Koopman image, yielding principal observables and a principal angle decomposition (PAD), a dynamics-informed alternative to SVD truncation with significantly improved performance. Multi-step error bounds are derived for Koopman and Perron--Frobenius mode decompositions, including RKHS-based pointwise guarantees, and are complemented by Gaussian process expected error surrogates. The resulting toolbox enables validated spectral analysis, certified forecasting, and principled dictionary and kernel learning, demonstrated on chaotic and high-dimensional benchmarks and real-world datasets, including cavity flow and the Pluto--Charon system.

</details>


### [895] [Generalized Tadmor Conditions and Structure-Preserving Numerical Fluxes for the Compressible Flow of Real Gases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15112)
*Robin Klein,Benjamin Sanderse,Pedro Costa,Rene Pecnik,Ruud Henkes*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 将Tadmor的代数数值通量条件推广到更广泛的二次结构（包括非凸量），提出广义Tadmor条件和离散零一致性要求，并基于离散梯度算子构造通量，应用于任意状态方程的欧拉方程，开发了开源多GPU求解器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Tadmor条件仅适用于凸熵函数，无法处理更广泛的二次结构（如非凸量），这些结构在守恒律中普遍存在但缺乏系统的离散方法。

Method: 提出广义Tadmor条件处理非凸二次结构，引入离散零一致性要求确保通量存在性，利用离散梯度算子构造满足条件的数值通量，特别针对任意状态方程的欧拉方程。

Result: 成功推导出适用于任意状态方程的熵守恒和动能一致数值通量，开发了开源多GPU求解器HelmEOS2，在超临界/跨临界流动测试中验证了性能。

Conclusion: 广义Tadmor条件和离散零一致性为处理非凸二次结构提供了系统框架，离散梯度算子实现了通量构造，所开发方法在复杂可压缩流动中表现出色。

Abstract: We generalize Tadmor's algebraic numerical flux condition for entropy-conservative discretizations of conservation laws to a broader class of secondary structures, i.e. possibly non-convex secondary quantities whose evolution can consist of both conservative and non-conservative contributions. The resulting generalized Tadmor condition yields a discrete local balance law for secondary structures alongside the discrete conservation law that is solved. In contrast to the convex entropy setting, non-convex secondary quantities can have singular Hessians and non-injective gradients; this introduces an additional necessary structural requirement, which we term (discrete) null-consistency. Null-consistency constrains admissible numerical work terms and is required for the existence and well-posedness of fluxes satisfying the generalized Tadmor condition. To construct such fluxes in practice, we show how discrete gradient operators provide systematic construction methods even when some of the functions entering the secondary structure are arbitrary, as in compressible flow closed by an arbitrary equation of state. As an application, we derive an entropy-conserving and kinetic-energy-consistent numerical flux for the Euler equations with an arbitrary (non-ideal) equation of state. We demonstrate the performance of the resulting scheme on a set of supercritical/transcritical compressible-flow test cases using several non-ideal equations of state, including a fully turbulent transcritical flow with a state-of-the-art equation of state and models for viscosity and heat conductivity. Computations are performed with our new open-source, flexible, JAX-based, multi-GPU compressible flow solver for Helmholtz-based equations of state available at github.com/rbklein/HelmEOS2.

</details>


### [896] [Structure-preserving preconditioning of discrete space-fractional diffusion equations with variable coefficient and θ-Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15122)
*Muhammad Faisal Khan,Asim Ilyas,Rolf Krause,Stefano Serra-Capizzano,Cristina Tablino-Possio*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 该论文研究时空分数阶扩散方程离散化产生的矩阵谱性质及预处理策略，主要创新在于处理非恒定系数a(x)的情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究时空分数阶扩散方程离散化产生的线性系统的谱性质，特别是当系数a(x)非常数时的预处理问题，这对于高效求解这类复杂方程至关重要。

Method: 采用空间上的移位Grünwald公式和时间上的θ-方法进行离散化，利用广义局部Toeplitz(GLT)理论分析矩阵序列的谱分布，并基于离散算子的结构特性开发预处理策略。

Result: 成功分析了未预处理和预处理矩阵序列的谱分布，特别是完全覆盖了系数a(x)非常数的情况，数值结果支持了GLT理论分析。

Conclusion: 该研究为时空分数阶扩散方程的数值求解提供了有效的预处理策略和理论分析框架，特别是在处理非恒定系数问题上取得了创新性进展。

Abstract: This paper studies the spectral properties of large matrices and the preconditioning of linear systems, arising from the finite difference discretization of a time-dependent space-fractional diffusion equation with a variable coefficient $a(x)$ defined on $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^d$, $d=1,2$. The model involves a one-sided Riemann-Liouville fractional derivative multiplied by the function $a(x)$, discretized by the shifted Gr"unwald formula in space and the $θ$-method in time. The resulting all-at-once linear systems exhibit a $(d+1)$-level Toeplitz-like matrix structure, with $d=1,2$ denoting the space dimension, while the additional level is due to the time variable.
  A preconditioning strategy is developed based on the structural properties of the discretized operator. Using the generalized locally Toeplitz (GLT) theory, we analyze the spectral distribution of the unpreconditioned and preconditioned matrix sequences. The main novelty is that the analysis fully covers the case where the variable coefficient $a$ is nonconstant. Numerical results are provided to support the GLT based theoretical findings, and some possible extensions are briefly discussed.

</details>


### [897] [An Efficient Cumulative Edge-Detection Method for Image Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15151)
*Toluwani Okunola,Mirjeta Pasha,Misha E. Kilmer*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文提出CR-ℓq-RMM-GKS方法，结合累积边缘检测与计算效率，用于图像重建中的边缘保持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在医学扫描和科学成像中，从噪声测量重建图像是一个逆问题。传统正则化方法会模糊尖锐边缘，丢失重要细节。现有累积边缘检测方法效果虽好但计算成本高。

Method: 将Gazzola的累积加权方法与RMM-GKS结合，处理一般ℓq惩罚(0<q≤2)，自动选择正则化参数，并在迭代间回收Krylov子空间，将嵌套结构简化为两层。

Result: 在信号去模糊和断层扫描实验中，CR-ℓq-RMM-GKS比标准非累积方法产生显著更锐利的边缘重建。特别是CR-ℓ1-RMM-GKS优于标准ℓ1方法和CR-ℓ2-RMM-GKS。

Conclusion: 累积加权与ℓ1惩罚高度互补，CR-ℓq-RMM-GKS在保持边缘的同时实现了计算效率，为图像重建提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: When reconstructing images from noisy measurements, such as in medical scans or scientific imaging, we face an inverse problem: recovering an unknown image from indirect, corrupted observations. These problems are typically ill-posed, meaning small amounts of noise can lead to inaccurate reconstructions. Regularization techniques address this by incorporating prior assumptions about the solution, such as smoothness or sparsity. However, standard methods often blur sharp edges--the boundaries between tissues or structures--losing critical detail.
  A powerful strategy for edge preservation is iterative reweighting, which solves a sequence of weighted subproblems with adaptively updated weights. Non-cumulative schemes derive weights from the current iterate alone and can be solved efficiently using the Recycled Majorization-Minimization Generalized Krylov Subspace method (RMM-GKS). The cumulative approach of Gazzola et al. progressively accumulates edge information across iterations, achieving superior edge preservation but at high computational cost.
  This work introduces CR-$\ell_q$-RMM-GKS, which combines cumulative edge detection with computational efficiency. We integrate Gazzola's cumulative weighting with RMM-GKS, which handles general $\ell_q$ penalties ($0 < q \le 2$), automatically selects regularization parameters, and recycles Krylov subspaces between iterations, reducing the nested structure to two levels.
  Numerical experiments in signal deblurring and tomography demonstrate that CR-$\ell_q$-RMM-GKS produces significantly sharper edge reconstructions than standard non-cumulative methods. In particular, CR-$\ell_1$-RMM-GKS outperforms both standard $\ell_1$ methods and CR-$\ell_2$-RMM-GKS, indicating that cumulative weighting and $\ell_1$ penalties are highly complementary.

</details>


### [898] [Adjoint-Based Gradient Evaluation for Metasurface Inverse Design via Affine Geometric Transformations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15210)
*Vincenzo Mottola,Luisa Faella,Carlo Forestiere,Antonello Tamburrino*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于伴随变量法的大规模超表面逆设计系统方法，通过参数化元原子几何参数和快速梯度计算实现高效优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纳米材料和复杂结构（如超表面和超透镜）制造能力的提升，使得精确控制电磁场成为可能。对大规模结构和更复杂功能的需求，促使研究能够平衡设计效果与计算成本的先进逆设计技术。基于伴随变量法的方法因其梯度计算成本低而具有吸引力。

Method: 提出系统化的伴随变量法应用于大规模超表面设计：1）参数化元原子的相关几何参数；2）快速计算相对于这些参数的梯度，允许在优化过程中实现一般的仿射变换。

Result: 主要发现首先从理论上进行了论证，并通过数值验证展示了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法为大规模超表面设计提供了一种计算效率高的逆设计解决方案，能够处理复杂几何变换，在保持设计效果的同时控制计算成本。

Abstract: The sharp increasing in fabrication capabilities of nanomaterials, and complex structures such as meta-surfaces and metalens, has opened to the possibility of employing them for accurately control the electromagnetic field, beyond the possibility ensured by traditional devices.
  The demand for large scale structures and more complex functionalities from meta-surfaces lead to the research for advanced techniques of inverse design, able to conjugate the ability to produce effective designs and limited computational cost. Among the various approaches for inverse design of large meta-surfaces, the ones based on the adjoint variable method are appealing since able to ensure a minimal computational cost for the gradient computation of the cost function.
  In this work, a systematic methodology for the application of the adjoint variable method for large meta-surface design is presented. The method is based on: (i) a parametrization of the relevant geometric parameters of the meta-atoms, (ii) the fast computation of the gradient with respect such parameters, allowing for the implementation of general affine transformations during the optimization process.
  The main findings are first theoretically justified and a numerical validation is provided to show the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [899] [Multilevel Sparse Tensor Approximation for High-Dimensional Parametric PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15284)
*Martin Eigel,Philipp Trunschke,Dana Wrischnig*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 本文研究了高维仿射参数扩散方程的多层稀疏张量逼近方法的效率，结合SALS算法和多层Galerkin离散化策略，显著降低了计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维参数化偏微分方程的传统数值方法面临维度灾难问题，计算成本随维度指数增长。需要开发高效的多层稀疏张量逼近方法来降低计算复杂度。

Method: 采用稀疏交替最小二乘(SALS)算法构建自适应张量链(TT)逼近，结合多层Galerkin离散化策略，利用解的规律性通过层级自适应采样减少计算量。

Result: 理论分析表明多层方法的工作开销与离散化层级无关，与单层方法的指数增长形成鲜明对比。数值实验验证了高维设置下的效率提升。

Conclusion: 提出的多层稀疏张量逼近方法能有效解决高维参数化偏微分方程的维度灾难问题，理论框架具有通用性，可扩展到其他模型类别。

Abstract: In this paper the efficiency of multilevel sparse tensor approximation methods for high-dimensional affine parametric diffusion equations is investigated. Methodologically, the recently presented Sparse Alternating Least Squares (SALS) algorithm is employed to construct adaptive tensor train (TT) approximations of quantities of interest (QoI). By combining this tensor-based approach with a multilevel Galerkin discretization strategy, the solution's regularity can be exploited to significantly reduce computational costs by level-adapted sample sizes. A rigorous theoretical analysis is derived, demonstrating that the work overhead for the proposed multilevel method remains independent of the discretization level, which stands in stark contrast to the exponential growth observed in single-level approaches. The presented analysis is quite general and not constrained to the sparse TT format but uses a generic framework that can be extended to other model classes. Numerical experiments validate the predicted efficiency gains in high-dimensional settings.

</details>


### [900] [A scaled TW-PINN: A physics-informed neural network for traveling wave solutions of reaction-diffusion equations with general coefficients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15331)
*Seungwan Han,Kwanghyuk Park,Jiaxi Gu,Jae-Hun Jung*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出一种可扩展的物理信息神经网络框架（scaled TW-PINN），用于高效计算n维反应扩散方程的旅行波解，通过尺度变换将问题简化为一维标准形式，实现单一网络对不同系数和维度的通用求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理不同反应扩散系数和空间维度时需要重新训练神经网络，计算效率低且缺乏通用性。需要开发一个能够适应多种系数选择和空间维度的统一框架。

Method: 通过旅行波形式的尺度变换，将原始n维反应扩散方程简化为一维标准反应扩散方程（单位反应和扩散系数）。基于此构建scaled TW-PINN框架，训练单一PINN求解器，可重复用于不同系数选择和空间维度。

Result: 在一维和二维数值实验中，scaled TW-PINN表现出高精度和灵活性，性能优于现有的wave-PINN方法。证明了该PINN求解器对旅行波解的通用逼近性质，并成功扩展到具有一般初始条件的Fisher方程。

Conclusion: scaled TW-PINN框架为计算反应扩散方程的旅行波解提供了一种高效、通用且可扩展的方法，通过尺度变换实现了单一网络对多种参数配置的通用求解，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: We propose an efficient and generalizable physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework for computing traveling wave solutions of $n$-dimensional reaction-diffusion equations with various reaction and diffusion coefficients. By applying a scaling transformation with the traveling wave form, the original problem is reduced to a one-dimensional scaled reaction-diffusion equation with unit reaction and diffusion coefficients. This reduction leads to the proposed framework, termed scaled TW-PINN, in which a single PINN solver trained on the scaled equation is reused for different coefficient choices and spatial dimensions. We also prove a universal approximation property of the proposed PINN solver for traveling wave solutions. Numerical experiments in one and two dimensions, together with a comparison to the existing wave-PINN method, demonstrate the accuracy, flexibility, and superior performance of scaled TW-PINN. Finally, we explore an extension of the framework to the Fisher's equation with general initial conditions.

</details>


### [901] [FFT-accelerated computation of the Dirichlet-to-Neumann map for inhomogeneous exterior Helmholtz problems using the method of fundamental solutions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15378)
*Takemi Shigeta*

Main category: math.NA

TL;DR: 提出一种基于基本解法的数值方法，用于计算二维非齐次Helmholtz方程外问题的Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射，结合有限元法将无界域问题转化为有界域问题求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决二维非齐次Helmholtz方程外问题在无界域上的数值计算困难，传统方法计算成本高，需要高效计算DtN映射并将其纳入有限元框架。

Method: 采用基本解法近似外域解，当源点和配置点在同心圆上等间距分布时，离散化系数矩阵成为循环矩阵，可利用FFT高效计算离散DtN映射。然后将DtN映射定义的边界条件纳入有限元公式，将无界域问题转化为有界计算域问题。

Result: 数值算例表明，提出的MFS方法能够高精度计算DtN映射，结合DtN边界条件的有限元法能够准确求解无界域上的非齐次Helmholtz外问题。

Conclusion: 该方法成功将无界域问题转化为有界域问题，通过MFS高效计算DtN映射并结合有限元法，为二维非齐次Helmholtz外问题提供了准确高效的数值解法。

Abstract: An efficient numerical method is proposed for computing the Dirichlet-to-Neumann (DtN) map associated with the exterior Dirichlet problem for the two-dimensional Helmholtz equation with an inhomogeneous term. The exterior solution is approximated by the method of fundamental solutions (MFS). When the source and collocation points are equally spaced on concentric circles, the coefficient matrices arising in the discretization become circulant, which enables efficient evaluation of the discrete DtN map by the fast Fourier transform (FFT). By incorporating the boundary condition defined by the DtN map into a finite element formulation, the original exterior problem posed on an unbounded domain is reduced to an equivalent problem on a bounded computational domain, which can then be solved by the finite element method (FEM). Numerical examples show that the proposed MFS-based approach computes the DtN map with high accuracy, and that the FEM incorporating the boundary condition defined by the DtN map yields accurate solutions for exterior Helmholtz problems with an inhomogeneous term posed on unbounded domains.

</details>
